---
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 1.8cm
      y: 1.5cm
    fontsize: 10pt
    section-numbering: ""
---

```{r setup}
source("R/render.R")
cv <- cv_load()
```

```{r results='asis'}
cat(sprintf("# %s\n\n", cv$basics$name))
cat(sprintf("*%s — %s*\n\n", cv$basics$label, cv$meta$tagline))
emit_contact_line(cv, sep = " · ")
```

## Summary

```{r results='asis'}
emit_summary(cv)
```

## Experience

```{r results='asis'}
emit_work(cv, "resume")
```

## Education

```{r results='asis'}
emit_education(cv, "resume")
```

## Skills

```{r results='asis'}
emit_skills(cv, "resume")
```

## Selected Publication

```{r results='asis'}
emit_publications(cv)
```
